# PieChart

Data-driven SVG pie chart for @rokkit/chart.

## Import

```svelte
import { PieChart } from '@rokkit/chart'
```

## Usage

```svelte
<!-- Basic pie chart -->
<PieChart data={data} label="segment" y="share" color="segment" />

<!-- With legend -->
<PieChart data={data} label="segment" y="share" color="segment" legend />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| data | Object[] | [] | Chart data |
| label | string | — | Slice label field |
| y | string | — | Slice value field |
| color | string | — | Color channel field |
| width | number | 400 | SVG width |
| height | number | 400 | SVG height |
| mode | 'light' \| 'dark' | 'light' | Color palette mode |
| legend | boolean | false | Show legend |

## Notes

- Uses ChartBrewer internally for reactive data binding
- Renders SVG arc path elements centered in the SVG
- No axes — use label for categories and y for numeric values
- Compatible with the declarative Chart wrapper via shared context key
